build.//: Each block below is a 'profile' = a recipe for building the app.

development.//: For day-to-day coding. Builds a dev-client APK you install once, then your JavaScript reloads instantly over wifi.

preview.//: A real, standalone APK you can sideload straight onto a phone — no Play Store, no dev server needed. This is the one to share.

production.//: Same as preview but for a final release build.
